changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO about_release_note ( version_label, title, summary, content_markdown, published_at, display_order, highlighted ) SELECT '2026.03.12', '新增语雀 OpenAPI 项目级 Skill', '基于本地 yuque_openapi HTML 文档整理语雀接口，便于后续读取个人语雀文档与知识库。', E'## 本次更新

- 新增项目级 `yuque-openapi-guide` skill
- 按鉴权、读取链路、知识库、文档、目录、团队统计分拆 references，减少无关上下文加载
- 总结语雀 OpenAPI 的 repo/doc/toc/search/version 等接口，便于后续接入个人语雀知识库', TIMESTAMPTZ '2026-03-12 11:30:00+08', -3, FALSE WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM about_release_note WHERE version_label = '2026.03.12' AND title = '新增语雀 OpenAPI 项目级 Skill' );
